name: agentbox
description: A small threaded message relay for ChatGPT and local agents.

scripts.build:cli:all: mkdir -p dist/release && GOOS=darwin GOARCH=arm64 go build -o dist/release/agentbox-darwin-arm64 ./cmd/agentbox && GOOS=darwin GOARCH=amd64 go build -o dist/release/agentbox-darwin-amd64 ./cmd/agentbox && GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -o dist/release/agentbox-linux-amd64 ./cmd/agentbox && GOOS=linux GOARCH=arm64 go build -o dist/release/agentbox-linux-arm64 ./cmd/agentbox && GOOS=windows GOARCH=amd64 go build -o dist/release/agentbox-windows-amd64.exe ./cmd/agentbox
scripts.test:parity: echo "TypeScript parity oracle removed; use Go tests plus rollout smoke checks."
scripts.build:all: bun run build && bun run build:cli
scripts.prepare: if [ "$VERCEL" = "1" ]; then echo "Skipping CLI prepare on Vercel"; else bun run build:cli; fi
